Post-Launch Email Sequence
Introduction
Bonus
Why having a post-launch communication
strategy is important…
For clients…
• To the reinforce they made the right decision
• To get them to consume your product and get
results
• Welcome them into your world
• Answer the most common questions
• Build and deepen your relationship
• Reduce refunds
• Increase back-end sales
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 26 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Remember, a client is 15 to 20x more
valuable than a prospect.
For prospects…
• To keep them engaged and warm
• Build a relationship
Post-Launch Email Sequence
Strategies
Bonus
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 26 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
For clients…
• Move them off your launch list to your buyers list
• During program rollout, be careful about sending
other promotions
• Create an onboarding sequence
• Customize your onboarding sequence to your
offer
For clients…
• Ask for feedback and keep them engaged
• Automate your follow up
• Monitor it (i.e. find out what people are opening
and clicking on and use that information to adjust
your sequence)
• Read their feedback
For prospects…
• Where are you going to point them to next?
• Nurture sequence
• Consider downsell or another offer
• Run them through an Evergreen Launch for
another product?
• Have “flagship” content piece that you send at
least weekly
• Don’t wait until your next launch to be in touch
with them again
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 26 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Post-Launch Email Sequence
Examples
Bonus
Here are some examples of what to mail or
communicate when someone buys…
What to mail or communicate…
• Thank you / welcome email
• Tell them what to do next / what to expect…
• e.g. set your password, create your profile
(online course)
• e.g. when their order will ship (if a physical
product)
• How to get support
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 26 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
What to mail or communicate…
• Introduce ways to plug into the community
• Answer common questions
• Reinforce their purchase
• e.g. point out key elements of the product that
will help them get results
What to mail or communicate…
• Create a drip email sequence (for online courses
that drip
content)
• Re-engage / remind people to take action
• Request feedback / survey your clients
• Request case studies / testimonials
Let’s look at our PLF Owner email
sequence for examples…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 26 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	6
After Owner email sequence is complete,
don’t stop…
• Offer challenges
• Continue to check-in
• Offer surprise bonuses
• Add to regular emails
• Promote additional offer
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Sample Email Sequence for PLF New Owners
Subject 	Note
[PLF] welcome and login details
[PLF] Welcome to Product Launch Formula! 	Longer welcome after first login
[PLF] some quick “head start” advice… 	Encouragement, mental game
[PLF] going further, faster... 	Highlight: Bonus Mini-Modules
[PLF] Module 1 is now live… 	M1 is open: Launch Foundation
[PLF] M1 Feature - Mental Triggers 	Highlight: Mental Triggers Lesson
[PLF] how was week 1? 	Reengage Unopens from M & Th
[PLF]: Module 2 is now live… 	M2 is open: Your Launch Plan
[PLF] your subscribers are waiting… 	Highlight: Building Your List
[PLF] everything alright? 	Reengage Unopens from M & Th
[PLF] Module 3 is now live… 	M3 is open: Pre-Prelaunch
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Encouragement: Headstart advice
Subject: [PLF] some quick “head start” advice…
I remember this time when there was a question in the PLF
Community... it was posted by someone who just joined, and
he was looking for some tips from veteran PLF Owners on
how to get the most out of Product Launch Formula.
Well, I'm not a veteran PLF Owner... but I decided to chime
in with my thoughts.
So here you go in six easy steps:
First thing, immerse yourself in the PLF Owner community.
There are lots of ways to do that… but the quickest and
easiest is introduce yourself in the comments section below
each video.
We’ve also got the PLF Alumni Facebook group here:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/plfalumni/
You’ll want to join that if you’re on Facebook… it’s a great
way to get a little extra support from your fellow Owners as
you start your launch journey.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 26 --

The thing I’ve noticed over the last 10 years of PLF is that
the people who plug into the community are the people who
keep getting amazing long term results.
Second... just trust the process. This has worked over
and over for people in all kinds of markets and businesses.
And in every corner of the world. It will work for you if you
just work through the program.
Third, don't get overwhelmed. Remember, it's ALWAYS
about "baby steps".
Rome wasn't built in a day… and you aren't going to
transform your business and life in a day. But just keep
taking small steps in the right direction, and you'll get there.
Fourth... obviously, work your way through the PLF
material. And repetition is the mother of all achievement. Go
back through the training a second time. That’s what I do
with all my key training - you’ll get even more the second
time through!
Fifth... attend the Coaching Calls. You're going to be able to
personally ask me (and my coaches) your questions. Either
way, you’ll hear the insights, struggles, and questions that
other folks in the PLF Community have.
Sixth... in addition to the modules, there's a LOT of extra
foundational material in the “Tools” section (within the
Course Menu) and the “Resources” menu. Both are on your
PLF Dashboard - take advantage!
OK, that's it for now... just thought this might come in
handy.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 26 --

best regards,
Jeff
P.S. You can learn a lot by watching how others use PLF in
their business...that’s why we have several really cool PLF
Owner Spotlight stories for you to check out.
These are stories with real-life PLF Owners in a variety of
different businesses who have done some really amazing
things with their launches. They will blow you away.
You can find these Owner Spotlights at the bottom of the
Getting Started page of the portal. Click here to access
them:
(link)

Bonus mini modules
Subject: [PLF] going further, faster...
Are you familiar with Waze?
It’s this crazy cool app that helps get you around
traffic jams and other roadblocks.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 26 --

I love that because I really don’t like being stopped dead in
traffic...
It’s just not fun.
(And it’s one of the MANY reasons I am so focused on
helping people build a business that gets RID of the
nightmare commute.)
Before Waze, you just had to tough it out…
But now, you can turn on that app and it finds these
little shortcuts that get you where you’re going much faster.
I haven’t seen a Waze for business shortcuts… so
I created my own.
Three bonus STRATEGIC mini-modules… shortcuts designed
to get you around the obstacles that can often pop up in
business.
First is the OPERATION QUICK START training…
This one is great if you’re just starting out - it will show you
how to cut through the clutter, the confusion, and the “shiny
object syndrome” so you can focus on the critical things you
need to do at the start of your business… FAST.
Then we have the SECRETS TO LEVERAGE AND SCALE
mini-module…
If you’ve been mostly working with clients 1-on-1, this bonus
is all about creating a business that will continue to grow
while you actually spend LESS time in it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 26 --

Your third mini-module is my LAUNCH PARTNERSHIP
training…
If you’ve ever considered helping other people with their
launches… as a Launch Manager, a Launch Consultant, or
even as a full business partner, then this course contains the
non-obvious things you need to get right in order to avoid
disaster.
You get all three of those mini-modules for free as part of
Product Launch Formula. And they’re available to you right
now.
You can access the mini-modules in the PLF
portal right here:
(link)
best regards,
Jeff

lucrative niche

attract the people you can best serve

these tips can be used to help an existing list grow even faster)
● Creating a step-by-step plan for your launch so you can tap into
momentum and get going quickly

Week 2, Email 2
SUBJECT: [PLF] your subscribers are waiting…
Right now, there are hundreds (maybe even THOUSANDS) of
people who are waiting to hear from you.
They’re waiting for you to create your lead magnet and start
attracting them into your world.
So… let’s help them find you!
Earlier this week I released Module 2.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 26 --

It’s all about choosing your niche, defining your avatar, and
building your list.
And I can’t hammer on the importance of this enough: you
NEED a list.
It doesn’t matter if you have a big social following or a lot of
subscribers to your Youtube channel. On those platforms, all
it takes is one rule change and you could lose your entire
audience overnight.
With an email list, you’re creating an asset you can take with
you, and you can use it regardless of the latest trend.
So let’s get started… it’s all part of Module 2:
(link)

your tribe at this point in your launch
